robot_capabilities.robot3: Differential drive carry robot for indoor transport and cooperative item delivery.

robot_morphology.robot1: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.15 m, Payload: 5 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic
robot_morphology.robot2: Drive Type: Differential Drive, Radius: 0.15 m, Payload: 5 kg, Mobility: Non-holonomic

robot_morphology.robot4: Drive Type: Holonomic, Radius: 0.15 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Omnidirectional
robot_morphology.robot5: Drive Type: Holonomic, Radius: 0.15 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Omnidirectional
robot_morphology.robot6: Drive Type: Holonomic, Radius: 0.15 m, Payload: 10 kg, Mobility: Omnidirectional

task_specific_rules: All robots are designated as carry robots for transport and delivery tasks.
Differential drive robots are preferred for straight-line and formation-based transport tasks.
Holonomic robots are preferred for precise positioning, docking, and confined space transport.
Holonomic robots may assist differential drive robots during cooperative payload transport.
task_replanning_rules: If a differential drive robot cannot reach a goal due to maneuvering constraints, reassign the task to a holonomic robot.
If a robot carrying payload fails, redistribute payload among available robots based on payload capacity.
If congestion occurs, holonomic robots may be reassigned to optimize flow and positioning.
